workthrough.welcome:
Welcome to FRIENDSHIP.DAO!

briefly explain what you can do at FRIENDSHIP.DAO.
workthrough.home: In Home, you will find summaries of your Offers and Dashboard. It also recommends action suggestions based on your activity and number of music views.
workthrough.offers: On Offers, you can search for offers that are right for you, and once you have applied to an offer and it has been approved, you will begin working with the offer creator and the offer's partners. Once you complete an offer, you will be awarded points.
workthrough.dashboard: The Dashboard integrates the number of views of your registered music channels and visualizes your activity as an artist. You can see the number of views per week or month, the breakdown of users and countries where your music is being played, and other information that will be useful to you.
workthrough.community: In Community, you can see the connections you have made with other users you have connected with. You can also check the user page of the user you have connected with to see their connections. If you find a user you like, send them a message and connect with them.
profile.required-fields: Required fields are not filled in
purchase-dialog.title: You can purchase points.
purchase-dialog.description: Please select the number of points you want to purchase and proceed to payment.

purchase-dialog.notion: Payments within FRIENDSHIP.DAO can be made safely with Stripe.
home.showing-selected-artist: Showing selected artist. Selecting an artist will fix the display when you access again.
home.no-permission-to-view-artist: No permission to view this artist
home.plz-ask-permission-to-view: Please ask for permission to view the artist.
home.alert-for-user: If you have already done so, please wait a while before accessing. Once your viewing request is approved, you will be able to view the data.
home.alert-for-permissions: You can check the artists you are currently requesting access to in the lower left corner of the access management. (If it is not displayed, please try logging out and trying again.)
home.request-permission-dialog-title: Request permission to view artist data
home.request-permission-dialog-descripti: Please search by the official name. The search results can be scrolled. If you don't hit it well, try changing the upper and lower case letters, entering only the initials and scrolling to find it. If you still can't find it, please contact the office.
home.enter-artist-name-to-search: Enter the artist's name and search
concierge.welcome: Hello! I'm the concierge. If you have any questions, feel free to ask!
concierge.notion: This feature is experimental and may not be accurate in its answers or content. Please be aware of this. Accuracy will improve in future updates.
concierge.hint: hint: Be specific about the artist's name or group name.
concierge.ask-me-anything: Ask me anything with My Concierge.
message.select-user-to-send: Please select a user to send.
message.file-size-alert: Please keep the file size under 10MB
message.enter-message-with-navigation: Enter your message here. (Press Shift + Enter to enter)
message.allowed-file-types: Allowed file types: PDF, MP4, MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG
offer.offer-creation-notion: Users who hold 1 FSP or more can create an Offer
offer.offer-info: OFFERS allows artists to find and recruit for tasks that can support them in their musical activities.
offer.find-offer-guide: You can find recruiting Offers by clicking the magnifying glass icon in the upper right corner of the screen.
offer.offer-subject: Target Audience (Musician, Curator, Creator, Supporter etc.)
offer.attached-media: Attached Media (PDF files or MP4 videos)
offer.apply.confirmation: Are you sure you want to apply?
offer.delete-confirmation-description: Are you sure you want to delete this offer?
offer.create.description: Enter the details of the offer and create it.
offer.create.attach-media-description: You can upload PDF files and video files (MP4).
offer.create.file-upload-description: When you upload an offer image, it will be used as the main image and thumbnail of the offer page.
offer.create.file-upload-description-1: Media such as songs, PDFs, and images related to the offer will be displayed on the offer page when uploaded.
offer.create.title-placeholder: Example: Looking for people related to the event!
offer.create.deadline-placeholder: Example: Until the end of April 2024
offer.create.skills-placeholder: Example: Artists with digital skills, promoters who have promoted festivals
offer.create.publicity-description: If you make it private, only the specified users can view it.
offer.no-applicant: Users who have applied to this offer will be displayed here
offer.validation.required-fields: Required fields are not filled in
offer.dialog-descrioption: Please select the offer you want to apply for.
offer.error.min-larger-than-max: The minimum value must be less than the maximum value
dashboard.notion: Generation ratio data is based on data from Spotify. The data will be aggregated from February 1, 2025 onward. Data from other DSPs will be integrated in the future.
dashboard.no-data-collected: The data necessary for the calculation could not be collected.
dashboard.no-data-collected-1: It will be able to be calculated in the future when there are enough views.
dashboard.historical-notion: There is a slight time lag and error due to data acquisition via various DSPs. Daily data for Amazon and YouTube is not available.
dashboard.historical-description: The number of plays for each DSP is stacked and displayed
dashboard.info.title: On the dashboard, the dashboard provides data across DSPs, such as the number of plays of songs released by an artist.
dashboard.info.about-overview-1: The overview displays the total number of plays of songs released by an artist.
dashboard.info.collection-rule: Data collection rule is as follows
dashboard.info.collection-rule-2: Total number of views over the entire period of music released to date.
dashboard.info.about-trending-1: Trending displays information on the top five most played songs an artist has ever released.
dashboard.info.trending-rule: Displaying the top 5 songs with the highest total number of views over the entire period among the songs released so far.
dashboard.info.about-chart-1: Display multiple charts so that you can track trends in playback numbers.
fsp.title: FSP Portal
fsp.credential-description: A credential is a proof of contribution that is issued and managed on the blockchain. You can obtain it by meeting certain conditions and receive various benefits. You can register from your profile page.
prize.approve-confirmation: Do you want to approve this request?
prize.request-use-confirmation: Do you want to use this item?
prize.request-use-success: Successfully requested to use the prize
prize.exchange-confirmation: Do you want to exchange for {point} FSP?
